downstreamBlockers.message: Static zones are renderer-consumable, but body placements have not been decomposed into measured draw commands.
The static-zone handoff is not a complete document display list and has not been rendered to PDF bytes.
No complete rendered PDF exists for region-aware comparison with the canonical report.
The authoritative page plan remains thirteen pages; static-zone generation must not conceal the extra body page.
